title: Diplopappus obovatus
taxonomy: Diplopappus obovatus is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Diplopappus, which is part of the subfamily Mutisioideae. The plant is further classified as belonging to the tribe Mutisieae and is native to South Africa. More specifically, its classification is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Eudicots, Clade: Asterids, Order: Asterales, Family: Asteraceae, Genus: Diplopappus, Species: D. obovatus. This detailed classification helps in understanding the plant's evolutionary relationships and its place in the botanical hierarchy.
